description: Executive intelligence dashboard for platform risk assessment, incident impact analysis, and early warning signals. Designed for leadership review and incident retrospectives.

options.content:
Risk & Incident Intelligence

Platform Reliability • Threat Detection • Early Warning System

• MONITORING ACTIVE

panels.title: Platform Risk Level
panels.description: Composite risk score based on current error rate. Scale: 0 (no risk) to 100+ (critical). Calculated from $severity_window error rate.

panels.title: Active Error Rate
panels.description: Current server error rate as percentage of total requests.

panels.title: Error Budget Remaining
panels.description: 30-day error budget remaining. When this hits 0%, reliability investment should be prioritized over feature work.

panels.title: Burn Rate (1h) x
panels.description: Error budget burn rate. 1x = sustainable. 2x = budget exhausted in half the window. >5x = critical.

panels.title: DB Health
panels.description: Database connection pool headroom. Shows how much capacity remains before connection exhaustion.

panels.title: P95 Latency
panels.description: Platform-wide P95 request latency. Users notice degradation above 1 second.

panels.title: Error Rate Trend — Multi-Service
panels.description: Multi-service error rate trend. Spikes above the 1% threshold indicate active incidents.

panels.title: Error Volume — Absolute Count
panels.description: Error breakdown by HTTP status code. Identifies the type of failure occurring.

panels.title: Latency Distribution — Platform Wide
panels.description: Latency percentile band. The width of the colored area shows latency variability — wider = more unpredictable user experience.

panels.title: Endpoint Risk Ranking
panels.description: Endpoint risk score = error_rate x P95_latency. Higher score = more user impact. Focus remediation on the top entries.

targets.expr: topk(10, (sum by (handler) (rate(grafana_http_request_duration_seconds_count{status_code=~"5.."}[$__rate_interval])) / (sum by (handler) (rate(grafana_http_request_duration_seconds_count[$__rate_interval])) + 0.001)) * histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, handler) (rate(grafana_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket[$__rate_interval]))) * 1000)

panels.title: Infrastructure Saturation
panels.description: Key resource saturation metrics. Crossing 80% on any signal indicates capacity risk.

panels.title: Memory Pressure
panels.description: Memory usage trend. Continuous upward trend without plateaus indicates a potential memory leak.

panels.title: GC Impact on Latency
panels.description: Correlation between garbage collection activity and request latency. If these move together, GC is a performance bottleneck.

panels.title: Error Rate by Cluster
panels.description: Per-cluster error rate. Divergence between clusters may indicate infrastructure-specific issues.

panels.title: Cluster Latency Comparison
panels.description: P95 latency by cluster. Large differences suggest uneven load distribution or degraded nodes.

panels.title: Multi-Window Burn Rate
panels.description: Multi-window burn rate analysis (Google SRE methodology). Fast windows (5m) detect incidents. Slow windows (6h) show sustained trends. Values above 1x mean budget is being consumed faster than sustainable.

options.content:
Risk Intelligence • Platform Reliability Engineering
Executive Summary → SLA Report → Admin Command Center →

title: Risk & Incident Intelligence
